settings.title: Preferences
settings.preventSleep: Prevent system sleep while Stay Active is running
settings.operationIntervalHint: Delay between operations (move and/or click). With random interval enabled, a delay is chosen between the minimum and maximum each time.
settings.simulationHint: Enable movement and/or clicking. If both are enabled, both actions may occur at each interval.
settings.movementDisabledHint: Movement is disabled. Enable “Simulate mouse movement” to use movement range.
settings.rangeHint: Mouse movement range (1–5 recommended for minimal activity)
settings.regionEnabledDisablesRangeHint: Movement region is enabled, so movement range is disabled. The cursor will move to random points inside your selected rectangle.
settings.movementRegionInvalid: Saved movement region is no longer valid. Please reselect a region.

regionPicker.title: Select movement region
regionPicker.subtitle: Drag to draw a rectangle. Press Esc to cancel.
regionPicker.tooSmall: Selected region is too small. Please drag a larger rectangle.

app.menuHint: Use the menu bar icon to Start, Stop, Settings, or Quit.

permission.title: Accessibility permission required
permission.description: StayActive needs Accessibility access to simulate minimal mouse movement so your Mac stays active.
permission.firstTimeHint: Do not double-click the app. Right-click the app → Open.
